summary: Replace hosted CI with a local-only Linux and WSL verification contract
description: Replace hosted CI with a local-only Linux and WSL verification contract
acceptance: No GitHub Actions workflow or operational Actions claim remains in the stack
One local command verifies Python 3.11+, the full suite, and the stack/template pairing on Linux or WSL

evidence.summary: RED: local-only test failed while hosted workflow existed. GREEN: focused test passed. Regression: bash scripts/check-linux.sh selected Python 3.12 via uv, ran 47 tests, validated .go, and passed template pairing. Critic search found no operational Actions/CI references outside negative assertions.
